subjects.description: Labrador dog wearing glasses on a soft white bed
subjects.appearance_details: relaxed Labrador with stylish glasses, striped t-shirt, denim shorts, glossy fur, and papers spread nearby
subjects.relationship: single cozy subject surrounded by reading materials
subjects.location: center of a soft white bed in a bright bedroom
subjects.relative_size: medium dog scale, dominant subject in the room
subjects.orientation: lying diagonally across the bed while looking down at books and papers
subjects.pose: comfortably lying with front paws forward and head lowered toward the reading material
subjects.action: rests on the bed as if reading, shifting attention between books and scattered papers
subjects.state_changes: glasses catch light, head tilts, paw nudges a page, papers shift slightly
subjects.clothing: stylish glasses, striped t-shirt, and denim shorts
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: short Labrador fur with warm highlights and soft realistic texture
subjects.facial_features: broad muzzle, dark eyes behind glasses, black nose, floppy ears

background_setting: Bright peaceful bedroom with a large window casting warm light, a minimalist bookshelf, a cozy plush rug, soft white bedding, and books and papers scattered around the Labrador.

lighting.conditions: Warm daylight from the large window spreads across the bed, glasses, fur, papers, and white fabric.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm daylight from the large window spreads across the bed, glasses, fur, papers, and white fabric.

aesthetics.composition: Whimsical cozy realism, clean white bedding, soft rug texture, bookish clutter, and warm calm bedroom light.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Whimsical cozy realism, clean white bedding, soft rug texture, bookish clutter, and warm calm bedroom light.

cinematography.camera_motion: Medium shot from bed height with gentle shallow focus on the dog, glasses, and nearby papers.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Cozy domestic surrealism with soft natural light and playful character detail.
context: A Labrador dog dressed casually lies on a soft white bed among books and papers, appearing peacefully engaged in reading.

actions.description: The Labrador lies comfortably on the white bed, glasses catching warm window light as books surround it.
It tilts its head toward a page and nudges a paper slightly with one paw.
The dog settles back into a calm reading pose while the bright room remains still and cozy.

text_and_signage_elements.text: Books and papers show small unreadable lines and page blocks without specific readable titles.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: visible during the relevant shot interval

segments.description: Establish the dressed Labrador on the soft white bed with books and papers around it.
segments.key_changes: Window light warms the bedding and reflects in the glasses.

segments.description: Focus on the dog engaging with the scattered reading materials.
segments.key_changes: Head tilts, paw shifts paper, pages move slightly.
segments.camera: Gentle close-up on face, glasses, and papers.

segments.description: Show the quiet bedroom atmosphere as the dog relaxes on the bed.
segments.key_changes: Bookshelf and rug become clearer, the dog returns to stillness.
segments.camera: Slow slight pullback to include more room detail.

temporal_caption: A Labrador in glasses, a striped t-shirt, and denim shorts lies on a soft white bed among books and papers in a bright cozy room.
audio_description: Soft room tone, faint page rustle, gentle fabric movement, distant outdoor hush through the window, and quiet dog breathing.
